data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from BaWang International (Group) Holding Limited ( (HK:1338) ) is now available.

BaWang International (Group) Holding Limited has called its annual general meeting for 28 May 2026 in Guangzhou to present the audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and the accompanying directors’ and auditors’ reports. Shareholders will also vote on the re-election of executive director Chen Qiyuan and independent non-executive director Liu Jing, and authorize the board to set directors’ remuneration.

The meeting will further seek shareholder approval to re-appoint SHINEWING (HK) CPA Limited as the company’s auditors and to authorize the board to determine their fees. In addition, the board is asking for a general mandate to allot, issue, and deal in up to 20% of the company’s issued share capital, excluding treasury shares, which would give management added flexibility in future equity financing or corporate actions within prescribed limits.

More about BaWang International (Group) Holding Limited

BaWang International (Group) Holding Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong, operating in the consumer products sector with a focus likely centered on personal care goods given its branding and industrial complex in Guangzhou. The company is governed by a board comprising executive and independent non-executive directors and engages external auditors to review its financial statements in line with Hong Kong listing standards.

USAS Building System (Shanghai) Co.,Ltd. ( (HK:2671) ) has provided an announcement.

USAS Building System (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. has called its 2025 annual general meeting for May 15, 2026 in Shanghai, where shareholders will review core corporate documents including the board and supervisory reports, audited consolidated financial statements and the full annual report for 2025. The meeting will also seek approval of the final profit distribution plan, director remuneration for 2026, re-appointment of auditors and a special mandate allowing the board to repurchase up to 10% of the company’s issued H shares, potentially giving management more flexibility in capital management and shareholder return strategies.

The proposed share repurchase mandate would remain effective until the next annual meeting or earlier revocation, replacing any prior similar authorities still in force and aligning the company with common capital management practices among Hong Kong–listed issuers. These resolutions collectively set the framework for USAS Building System’s financial policy, governance oversight and capital structure decisions in the coming year, matters of direct interest to existing shareholders, prospective investors and other capital market stakeholders.

More about USAS Building System (Shanghai) Co.,Ltd.

USAS Building System (Shanghai) Co., Ltd. is a Chinese joint stock company listed in Hong Kong and active in the building systems sector. The company focuses on delivering construction-related products and services and is governed by a board of directors and supervisors in accordance with PRC corporate and securities regulations.

data.description:

Ferretti S.p.A. ( (IT:YACHT) ) has provided an announcement.

Ferretti S.p.A. has published the full set of documents for its ordinary Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for 14 May 2026, including the annual financial report, consolidated financial statements for 2025, management report with sustainability reporting, auditors’ reports and required certifications. The company has also released its corporate governance and ownership report, remuneration policy report, and the shareholder-submitted slates and related proposals for the renewal of the Board of Directors and Board of Statutory Auditors, enhancing transparency and giving investors ample time to review governance and financial information ahead of the meeting.

The documentation is available at the company’s registered office in Cattolica and on its website, in both standard and ESEF formats for the 2025 consolidated financial statements, ensuring equal access for Italian and Hong Kong investors. This broad disclosure underlines Ferretti’s compliance with Italian and Hong Kong listing rules and supports informed shareholder participation in key decisions on corporate bodies and oversight structures.

More about Ferretti S.p.A.

Ferretti S.p.A. is an Italy-based joint-stock company active in the luxury yacht and leisure boating industry. Listed in Hong Kong and Italy, it focuses on designing, manufacturing and selling high-end vessels under multiple brands to an international clientele, positioning itself in the premium segment of the global nautical market.

China Bozza Development Holdings Limited ( (HK:1069) ) has provided an update.

China Health Technology Group Holding Company Limited has called an extraordinary general meeting in Shenzhen on 12 May 2026 to seek shareholder approval for a sizeable rights issue. The company plans to issue up to 205,848,440 new shares at HK$0.25 each on the basis of two rights shares for every one share held on the 22 May 2026 record date.

Any rights shares not taken up by existing shareholders will be placed with independent investors through Tiger Faith Securities under a placing agreement also up for approval. The moves signal a concerted effort to raise fresh equity capital, potentially strengthening the company’s balance sheet and funding future development, while diluting existing holdings for shareholders who do not participate.

More about China Bozza Development Holdings Limited

China Health Technology Group Holding Company Limited is a Cayman Islands-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 1069. The group operates in the broader health technology sector, using Hong Kong as its capital-raising platform and maintaining key operations in Shenzhen, reflecting a focus on the Mainland China market.

InSilico Medicine Cayman TopCo ( (HK:3696) ) has issued an announcement.

InSilico Medicine has announced that its UAE research team has nominated ISM0387, an AI-designed MTA-cooperative PRMT5 inhibitor, as a preclinical candidate, marking a rapid discovery cycle from molecular design to lead optimization in under 12 months. The molecule, which shows improved activity, selectivity and brain penetration, is positioned as a potential new treatment for glioblastoma and underscores the growing role of regional R&D hubs in the company’s pipeline.

The selection of ISM0387 as the group’s 30th AI-supported preclinical candidate highlights the scale and maturity of InSilico Medicine’s AI-enabled portfolio and may strengthen its competitive standing in AI-first drug discovery. The achievement, backed publicly by UAE health and investment authorities, reinforces the company’s strategic integration into Abu Dhabi’s emerging life sciences ecosystem and signals continued support for its regional and global development efforts.

More about InSilico Medicine Cayman TopCo

An announcement from China Oriental Group Co ( (HK:0581) ) is now available.

China Oriental Group Co has convened its annual general meeting for 10 June 2026 in Hong Kong, where shareholders will be asked to adopt the audited consolidated financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025 and approve a final dividend of HK$0.02 per share and a special dividend of HK$0.05 per share. Investors will also vote on the re-election of four directors, including two long-serving independent non-executive directors, the re-appointment of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu as auditor, and a general mandate allowing the board to issue up to 20% of the company’s share capital, which would give management flexibility for future capital-raising or strategic transactions while potentially diluting existing holdings.

The proposed share issuance mandate, excluding treasury shares and certain standard exceptions such as rights issues and share schemes, is designed to remain in force until the next annual general meeting. These resolutions, if passed, will shape the company’s governance structure, capital management options and shareholder returns policy for the coming year, underscoring a balance between rewarding investors via dividends and preserving room for corporate and financing activities in the Hong Kong market.

More about China Oriental Group Co

China Oriental Group Co is a Bermuda-incorporated company listed in Hong Kong under stock code 581. The group operates in the industrial sector and is overseen by a board comprising executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, with its financial reporting audited by Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu.

United Company RUSAL has disclosed that it paid coupon income on its BO-001P-09 series exchange-traded bonds for the twenty-second coupon period running from 24 March 2026 to 23 April 2026. The total payout amounted to RUB 426.3 million, with bondholders receiving RUB 14.21 per bond across 30 million bonds.

The coupon on these exchange-traded bonds is calculated daily over the circulation period, using the Bank of Russia key rate as of the seventh day before the calculation date plus an additional 2.20% per annum S-spread. The announcement underscores RUSAL’s continued servicing of its ruble-denominated debt instruments on the Moscow Exchange, signalling ongoing access to and activity in the domestic bond market.

More about United Co RUSAL

United Company RUSAL is an international public joint-stock company and a major producer in the global aluminium industry. Listed in Hong Kong and on Russian exchanges, the group focuses on producing aluminium and related products for industrial and manufacturing customers worldwide.
